chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4334 of 2024 Sar Zameen Khan and another Versus Muhammad Idrees and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For order as to maintainability of petition..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 22.11.2024 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This petition was filed on 27.05.2024 when some objections were raised. When the matter was taken up by the Court on 10.09.2024, petitioners’ counsel was called absent. Today yet again the matter is fixed for the maintainability of the petition and the counsel is not in attendance. It seems that the petitioners have lost interest in the proceedings. Dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
